title: The clinical Alzheimer's disease spectrum classified in the A/T/N framework with 18F-Flutemetamol-Centiloid, 18F-MK-6240-CenTauR, and 18F-FDG-AD metaROI: a multicenter memory clinic observational study.
authors: Vere Rose Megens; Peter Wessel Strandhagen; E. M. Berntsen; Ebba Gløersen Müller; K. van Laere; L. Eikenes; A. Håberg
journal: European journal of nuclear medicine and molecular imaging
